content.en:
Boundary river.

A replica of Ye Tian's body converged with the white-bearded old man.

Now, the white-bearded old man only has this true god, and the incarnation can't take him into the Eleventh Boundary River, so he must be dispatched in his body.

"Endless Lord, gone. "

The white-bearded old man took Ye Tian to shuttle through the boundary river, and the speed was incomparably fast, comparable to the shuttle speed of the gate of the boundary river.

In terms of hurry, even if Ye Tian is comparable to the combat power of the Eternal Master, he cannot match the speed of the Eternal Master.

Soon, the white-bearded old man shuttled along the source of the thirteenth boundary river, breaking through layers of time and space, and came to a layer of time and space outside the origin realm, which was called the origin void circle.

"We don't need to enter the Origin Realm Sea, and then go to the Eleventh Boundary River, it is easier to cross from the Origin Void Circle into the Eleventh Boundary River, and when you become an eternal master in the future, you can also step into the Origin Void Circle. However, I am also "Seven Zero Three" for the first time to come to the Origin Void Circle!" said the white-bearded old man.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian and the white-bearded old man instantly broke through an invisible barrier of time and space, and stepped into the Origin Void Circle.

In Ye Tian's perception, the Origin Void Circle was very empty, but the rules here were extremely powerful, making him bear a certain amount of pressure.

Afraid of death, the Eternal Masters have come here, and it is a little difficult to move an inch.

However, without the Eternal Master, a half-step Eternal Master, would not be able to enter here.

The two of them kept shuttling, and finally passed through the long space-time area, from the place where the thirteenth boundary river was located to the origin void circle corresponding to the eleventh boundary river.

Then, the white-bearded old man tore through the space-time barrier between the Origin Void Circle and the Eleventh Boundary River, and sent Ye Tian in.

"Endless Lord, if you want to come back, contact me on the main body, and I will pick you up again!"

The white-bearded old man said.

"Thank you, Old Man Whitebeard!"

Ye Tian thanked.

Tear and pull!

Ye Tian passed through the space-time barrier and entered the Eleventh Boundary River.

......

"The Eleventh Boundary River and the Thirteenth Boundary River look similar!"

Ye Tianfei was in the eleventh boundary river, and said secretly.

After all, they are all boundary rivers, and they are just branches of the Origin Boundary Sea, so they don't seem to make any difference, just a difference in location.

Subsequently, Ye Tian came to a giant city in the No. 11 Boundary River, inquired about the news, and learned the news about the Five Elements Domain Sea and the detailed location.

After that, Ye Tian rushed to the Five Elements Domain Sea.

After a period of hurrying, he arrived at the Five Elements Domain Sea.

Outside the Five Elements Domain, there are dozens of giant cities and a large number of gathering places, which shows the great fame and prosperity of the Five Elements Domain Sea.

"It seems that the value of the Five Elements Boundary Crystal is very high!

Ye Tian said darkly.

If it's not high, the Eternal Master won't collect it.

Maybe for him, the Five Elements Boundary Crystal is just a material, but for some Eternal Controllers, the value of the Five Elements Boundary Crystal is probably more precious than that of the Realm Soldiers.

Wow!

Ye Tian entered the Five Elements Domain Sea, and as soon as he entered here, he found that the power of time and space was suppressed here.

"Time and space are the supreme power, I didn't expect that the power of the five elements is the main force here, and the power of time and space has been suppressed!"

Ye Tian was quite surprised.

It is only in such a place that such a treasure as the Five Elements Boundary Crystal will be born.

But even in the Five Elements Domain Sea, it was a little difficult to find a piece of the Five Elements Boundary Crystal, let alone a hundred.

However, Ye Tianda heard some information, such as the place where the Five Elements Realm beasts gathered, the Five Elements Realm Crystal would often be born.

Because the Five Elements Boundary Crystal exudes a strange power of the Five Elements, cultivators can't perceive it, but the Five Elements Realm Beasts can easily perceive it.

Ye Tian kept shuttling through the Five Elements Domain Sea, copying the talent and unfolding, probing the surrounding situation.

Every once in a while, he could sense the presence of a half-step Eternal Master, but everyone didn't interfere with each other.

Unless they encounter the Five Elements Boundary Crystal, they will fight each other, otherwise there are few fights in ordinary times.

"Found it!"

Ye Tian was suddenly overjoyed.

His copying talent sensed a Five Elements Realm Beast.

The strength of this Five Elements Realm Beast was also equivalent to that of a half-step Eternal Master, and he did not choose to follow the Five Elements Realm Beast, but prepared to copy the body of this Five Elements Realm Beast.

"Once the body of the Five Elements Boundary Beast is copied and a Five Elements Boundary Beast is condensed, maybe you can perceive the location of the Five Elements Boundary Crystal through the body of the Five Elements Boundary Beast, which is much more cost-effective than tracking the Five Elements Boundary Beast. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

So, he began to copy the body of the Five Elements Realm Beast.

A copy body in the outside world disintegrated itself, and there was one more copy quota, and then Ye Tian quickly condensed the body of the Five Elements Realm Beast..........

Soon, a Five Elements Realm Beast condensed and became a replica body.

The Five Elements Realm Beast was indeed very sensitive to the power of the Five Elements, and at this time, Ye Tian obviously felt that the Five Elements energy in a certain direction was much stronger, which had a certain attraction to him.

So, Ye Tian and the Five Elements Realm Beast copied their bodies and flew in that direction.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to arrive at his destination.

At this time, Ye Tian obviously sensed a source of energy, which was most likely the Five Elements Boundary Crystal, but he also sensed almost ten Five Elements Realm Beasts.

Ye Tian's arrival attracted the attention of these Five Elements Realm Beasts.

"Go away!"

These Five Elements Realm beasts drove Ye Tian away.

Ye Tian did not hesitate and immediately started.

He didn't let the body of the Five Elements Realm beast shoot, but let the copy body of the main body shoot, so that he could exert his strongest combat power.

Airplanes!!!!

Three thousand void hands shattered this piece of time and space with a single blow, and one after another the Five Elements Realm beasts were like ants, and they were killed by Ye Tian.

In an instant, these Five Elements Realm Beasts, whose strength was comparable to that of a half-step Eternal Master, were all killed.

"It's too weak!"

Ye Tian sighed.

With his current strength, killing an ordinary half-step Eternal Master is indeed a one-handed bombardment.

Then, Ye Tian began to look for the Five Elements Boundary Crystal.

With the assistance of the Five Elements Boundary Beast's replication body, he quickly locked the position of the Five Elements Boundary Crystal at 5.6.

This Five Elements Boundary Crystal is located deep in the peak of an island, and it is also the source of energy here, once it is taken away, the cultivation environment here is abolished.

Therefore, even if the Five Elements Realm Beast discovers the Five Elements Boundary Crystal, it will not take it away, but will only build a nest nearby to cultivate.

Click!

Ye Tian reached into the depths of the island's mountain peak with one hand and smashed the island in an instant.

Suddenly, a one-person-high Five Elements Boundary Crystal appeared in Ye Tian's hand.

At this moment, a breath appeared in the distance of Ye Tian.

A half-step Eternal Master is here!

Ye Tian had just focused his attention on this Five Elements Boundary Crystal, and he didn't perceive it until the other party approached.

"Close!"

Ye Tian put away the Five Elements Boundary Crystal and immediately prepared to leave.

But the half-step Eternal Master stopped Ye Tian and didn't seem to want him to leave. _
